testCases.notes: Variation products may show 'From $X' label below filter min — by-design xAPI behavior (lowest variation price)

testCases.title: Category - Pagination
testCases.notes: No pagination controls visible at bottom of category. /kitchen-supplies (146 products) renders ~25-32 cards with no Next/Previous, no Load more, no per-page selector. ?page=2 query param appears to be ignored — same products served regardless. Test infeasible in current theme/config.

testCases.title: Category - Products Per Page
testCases.notes: No items-per-page selector visible (no select element, button, or All filters control).

bugs.title: Category page has no pagination controls — only ~25-32 of 146 products reachable
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] Pagination controls visible at bottom of product list
bugs.stepsToReproduce:
1. Navigate to https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/kitchen-supplies (146 products)
2. Scroll to bottom of product grid
3. Observe — no pagination, no 'Load more', no per-page selector
bugs.expected: Pagination control allowing access to all 146 products
bugs.actual: Only ~25-32 product cards rendered; no UI to access remaining ~115 products. ?page=2 query param appears ignored.
